tEn: Step-3 is Large yet Affordable: Model-system Co-design for Cost-effective Decoding
tZh: Step-3：大模型也能低成本——模型-系统协同设计实现经济高效解码
sEn: Step-3 achieves cost-effective decoding through model-system co-design, with 321B parameters and 38B activated per token, outperforming DeepSeek-V3 in throughput and cost.
sZh: Step-3通过模型-系统协同设计，以321B参数和每token激活38B实现经济高效解码，在吞吐量和成本上超越DeepSeek-V3。
absEn: Large language models (LLMs) face low hardware efficiency during decoding, especially for long-context reasoning tasks. This paper introduces Step-3, a 321B-parameter VLM with hardware-aware model-system co-design optimized for minimizing decoding costs. Step-3 innovates in two key dimensions: (1) A novel Multi-Matrix Factorization Attention (MFA) mechanism that significantly reduces both KV cache size and computation while maintaining high attention expressiveness, and (2) Attention-FFN Disaggregation (AFD), a distributed inference system that decouples attention and Feed-Forward Network (FFN) layers into specialized subsystems. This co-design achieves unprecedented cost efficiency: Step-3 significantly reduces theoretical decoding costs compared with models like DeepSeek-V3 and Qwen3 MoE 235B, with the gains widening at longer context. Step-3 achieves low cost while activating 38B parameters per token (more than DeepSeek-V3 and Qwen3 MoE 235B), demonstrating that hardware-aligned attention arithmetic intensity, MoE sparsity, and AFD are critical to cost-effectiveness. We perform a head-to-head comparison with DeepSeek-V3 in its favorable scenarios. Our implementation on Hopper GPUs achieves a decoding throughput of up to 4,039 tokens per second per GPU under 50ms TPOT SLA (4K context, FP8, no MTP). It is higher than DeepSeek-V3's 2,324 in the same setup and sets a new Pareto frontier for LLM decoding.
absZh: 大型语言模型在解码时面临硬件效率低下的问题，尤其是长上下文推理任务。本文提出Step-3，一个321B参数的视觉语言模型，通过硬件感知的模型-系统协同设计，最小化解码成本。Step-3在两个关键维度创新：（1）新型多矩阵分解注意力机制，显著减少KV缓存大小和计算量，同时保持高注意力表达能力；（2）注意力-前馈网络解耦，一种分布式推理系统，将注意力和前馈网络层解耦为专门子系统。这种协同设计实现了前所未有的成本效率：与DeepSeek-V3和Qwen3 MoE 235B等模型相比，Step-3显著降低了理论解码成本，且优势随上下文长度增加而扩大。Step-3在每token激活38B参数（多于DeepSeek-V3和Qwen3 MoE 235B）的情况下实现低成本，表明硬件对齐的注意力算术强度、MoE稀疏性和AFD对成本效益至关重要。我们在DeepSeek-V3的有利场景下进行了直接比较。在Hopper GPU上的实现中，在50ms TPOT SLA（4K上下文，FP8，无MTP）下，每GPU解码吞吐量高达4039 token/s，高于DeepSeek-V3的2324 token/s，为LLM解码设立了新的帕累托前沿。

contrib.en: Proposes Step-3, a 321B-parameter VLM with hardware-aware model-system co-design for cost-effective decoding.
contrib.zh: 提出Step-3，一个321B参数的视觉语言模型，采用硬件感知的模型-系统协同设计，实现经济高效的解码。

contrib.en: Introduces Multi-Matrix Factorization Attention (MFA) to reduce KV cache and computation while maintaining expressiveness.
contrib.zh: 引入多矩阵分解注意力机制，在保持表达能力的同时减少KV缓存和计算量。

contrib.en: Proposes Attention-FFN Disaggregation (AFD) for distributed inference, decoupling attention and FFN into specialized subsystems.
contrib.zh: 提出注意力-前馈网络分离的分布式推理系统，将注意力层和前馈网络层解耦为专用子系统。

contrib.en: Achieves decoding throughput up to 4,039 tokens/s/GPU under 50ms TPOT SLA, outperforming DeepSeek-V3 by 74%.
contrib.zh: 在50ms TPOT服务等级协议下实现高达4039 tokens/s/GPU的解码吞吐量，比DeepSeek-V3高74%。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that hardware-aligned attention arithmetic intensity, MoE sparsity, and AFD are critical to cost-effectiveness.
contrib.zh: 证明硬件对齐的注意力算术强度、MoE稀疏性和AFD对成本效益至关重要。

contrib.en: Provides theoretical cost analysis showing Step-3 achieves lower decoding costs than DeepSeek-V3 and Qwen3 MoE 235B, especially at longer contexts.
contrib.zh: 通过理论成本分析表明，Step-3在解码成本上低于DeepSeek-V3和Qwen3 MoE 235B，尤其在长上下文场景下优势更大。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to decoding phase; prefill and training costs not optimized.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于解码阶段；预填充和训练成本未优化。

limits.en: Results based on specific hardware (Hopper GPUs) and may not generalize to other accelerators.
limits.zh: 结果基于特定硬件（Hopper GPU），可能不适用于其他加速器。

limits.en: Theoretical cost analysis assumes ideal conditions (peak FLOPs, maximum bandwidth) and ignores real-world overheads.
limits.zh: 理论成本分析假设理想条件（峰值FLOPs、最大带宽），忽略实际开销。

limits.en: Comparison with DeepSeek-V3 uses favorable scenarios for DeepSeek-V3; other models may have different strengths.
limits.zh: 与DeepSeek-V3的比较采用对其有利的场景；其他模型可能有不同优势。

limits.en: Model-system co-design may not be directly applicable to existing models without significant modifications.
limits.zh: 模型-系统协同设计可能无法直接应用于现有模型，需重大修改。

items.en: Large language models (LLMs) face low hardware efficiency during decoding, especially for long-context reasoning tasks. This paper introduces Step-3, a 321B-parameter VLM with hardware-aware model-system co-design optimized for minimizing decoding costs. Step-3 innovates in two key dimensions: (1) A novel Multi-Matrix Factorization Attention (MFA) mechanism that significantly reduces both KV cache size and computation while maintaining high attention expressiveness, and (2) Attention-FFN Disaggregation (AFD), a distributed inference system that decouples attention and Feed-Forward Network (FFN) layers into specialized subsystems. This co-design achieves unprecedented cost efficiency: Step-3 significantly reduces theoretical decoding costs compared with models like DeepSeek-V3 and Qwen3 MoE 235B, with the gains widening at longer context. Step-3 achieves low cost while activating 38B parameters per token (more than DeepSeek-V3 and Qwen3 MoE 235B), demonstrating that hardware-aligned attention arithmetic intensity, MoE sparsity, and AFD are critical to cost-effectiveness. We perform a head-to-head comparison with DeepSeek-V3 in its favorable scenarios. Our implementation on Hopper GPUs achieves a decoding throughput of up to 4,039 tokens per second per GPU under 50ms TPOT SLA (4K context, FP8, no MTP). It is higher than DeepSeek-V3’s 2,324 in the same setup and sets a new Pareto frontier for LLM decoding.
items.zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在解码过程中面临硬件效率低下的问题，尤其是在长上下文推理任务中。本文介绍了 Step-3，一个 321B 参数的视觉语言模型（VLM），通过硬件感知的模型-系统协同设计，以最小化解码成本为目标进行优化。Step-3 在两个关键维度上进行了创新：（1）一种新颖的多矩阵分解注意力（MFA）机制，显著减少了 KV 缓存大小和计算量，同时保持了高注意力表达能力；（2）注意力-FFN 分离（AFD），一种分布式推理系统，将注意力层和前馈网络（FFN）层解耦为专门的子系统。这种协同设计实现了前所未有的成本效率：与 DeepSeek-V3 和 Qwen3 MoE 235B 等模型相比，Step-3 显著降低了理论解码成本，且优势在更长上下文中进一步扩大。Step-3 在每 token 激活 38B 参数（多于 DeepSeek-V3 和 Qwen3 MoE 235B）的情况下实现了低成本，表明硬件对齐的注意力算术强度、MoE 稀疏性和 AFD 对成本效益至关重要。我们在 DeepSeek-V3 的有利场景下与其进行了直接比较。在 Hopper GPU 上的实现中，在 50ms TPOT SLA（4K 上下文，FP8，无 MTP）下，每 GPU 解码吞吐量高达 4,039 tokens/s，高于 DeepSeek-V3 在同一设置下的 2,324 tokens/s，为 LLM 解码设立了新的帕累托前沿。

items.en: This paper presents the model-system co-design of Step-3, specifically engineered for the test-time scaling paradigm with the primary optimization objective of minimizing decoding costs. Step-3 has 321 billion total parameters, while for each text token, 38B parameters are activated. We will demonstrate that, although Step-3 is in the multi-hundred billion parameter range and the activated parameters are slightly larger than representative open-weight models like DeepSeek V3 (DSv3) [4], we achieve significantly lower decoding costs with model-system co-design.
items.zh: 本文介绍了 Step-3 的模型-系统协同设计，该设计专门针对测试时扩展范式，主要优化目标是最小化解码成本。Step-3 总参数量为 3210 亿，每个文本 token 激活 38B 参数。我们将证明，尽管 Step-3 处于数千亿参数级别，且激活参数略大于 DeepSeek V3（DSv3）[4] 等代表性开源模型，但通过模型-系统协同设计，我们实现了显著更低的解码成本。

items.en: We focus on optimizing decoding because 1) it is the most expensive per token (because of low MFU) compared with training and prefill. 2) For reasoning models, longer thinking leads to higher intelligence, so lowering decoding costs can translate to higher intelligence for fixed-budget scenarios. 3) Faster and cheaper decoding also speeds up the RL training. 4) There is a large room for optimization and is therefore more technically interesting.
items.zh: 我们专注于优化解码，因为：1）与训练和预填充相比，解码每个 token 的成本最高（由于 MFU 低）。2）对于推理模型，更长的思考时间带来更高的智能，因此在固定预算场景下，降低解码成本可转化为更高的智能。3）更快、更便宜的解码也能加速强化学习训练。4）解码优化空间大，因此技术上更有趣。

items.en: Recently, there emerged several large open-weight models. Some of them explored novel architecture changes on top of traditional Transformers. The innovations focus on the two main Transformer components – there are new attention designs to reduce KV cache overhead during inference, and there are Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) structures to enhance FFN while limiting the growth of computation requirements.
items.zh: 最近出现了几个大型开源模型。其中一些在传统 Transformer 基础上探索了新颖的架构变化。创新集中在 Transformer 的两个主要组件上——新的注意力设计以减少推理过程中的 KV 缓存开销，以及混合专家（MoE）结构以增强 FFN 同时限制计算需求的增长。

items.capEn: Figure 1: The Pareto frontier of recent models regarding activated parameters and decoding costs. The darker area is GQA models’ Pareto frontier. Note: Step-3 also has the highest attention effective rank [7], the same as DSv3 and doubling some other models like Qwen3 MoE 235B and Kimi K2.
items.capZh: 图 1：近期模型在激活参数和解码成本方面的帕累托前沿。较暗区域是 GQA 模型的帕累托前沿。注意：Step-3 还具有最高的注意力有效秩 [7]，与 DSv3 相同，是 Qwen3 MoE 235B 和 Kimi K2 等其他模型的两倍。

items.en: We also started to work on model architecture exploration, e.g., through MoE model development (Step-2 [20]) since late 2023 and MFA [7], a new attention architecture released in late 2024. In the process, observing the recent open-weight models, we identify two common suboptimal practices:
items.zh: 我们也从 2023 年底开始通过 MoE 模型开发（Step-2 [20]）和 2024 年底发布的新注意力架构 MFA [7] 进行模型架构探索。在此过程中，观察近期开源模型，我们发现了两个常见的次优实践：

items.en: For attention, some are overly emphasizing on reducing KV cache sizes, at excessive cost of computation load. It makes the model less cost-effective to run on more affordable but weaker hardware. Meanwhile, it limits the room for other acceleration techniques like quantization and speculative decoding.
items.zh: 对于注意力，有些过于强调减少 KV 缓存大小，却以计算负载过高为代价。这使得模型在更便宜但较弱的硬件上运行成本效益降低，同时限制了量化、推测解码等其他加速技术的空间。

items.en: For FFN, some are overly emphasizing on pursuing sparser architectures without considering whether they fit today’s hardware. It either harms the hardware efficiency, or lowering model performance without gaining cost advantages.
items.zh: 对于 FFN，有些过于追求更稀疏的架构，而不考虑是否适合当前硬件。这要么损害硬件效率，要么降低模型性能而无法获得成本优势。

items.en: Hoping to inspire more discussion and rethinking about the above trends, we report our recent progress, Step-3, and the analysis and rationale behind its design. The outcome is promising – in Figure 1, we show the best theoretical decoding costs of Step-3 and recent models. For each model, we searched for the best deployment strategy based on Attention-FFN Disaggregation (AFD, §3), which we advocate, and any combination of H800, H20, A800 or Ascend 910B.111In practice, the FFN part of DSv3, Kimi K2 and Llama 4 Maverick may suffer from MoE over-sparsity (§5.4) and be farther from theoretical costs. In Figure 1, we give them a favor by ignoring the issue. Step-3 largely improves the Pareto frontier of activated parameters and decoding costs. Though not shown in the figure, its advantage continues to widen with longer context.222Some may wonder about hybrid linear attention models like MiniMax M1. We will discuss more in §4.3.
items.zh: 希望激发更多关于上述趋势的讨论和反思，我们报告了最新进展 Step-3，以及其设计背后的分析和原理。结果令人鼓舞——在图 1 中，我们展示了 Step-3 和近期模型的最佳理论解码成本。对于每个模型，我们基于所倡导的注意力-FFN 分离（AFD，§3）以及 H800、H20、A800 或 Ascend 910B 的任何组合，搜索了最佳部署策略。111 实际上，DSv3、Kimi K2 和 Llama 4 Maverick 的 FFN 部分可能因 MoE 过度稀疏（§5.4）而偏离理论成本。在图 1 中，我们忽略该问题以给予它们优惠。Step-3 显著改善了激活参数和解码成本的帕累托前沿。虽然图中未显示，但其优势在更长上下文中继续扩大。222 有人可能想知道 MiniMax M1 等混合线性注意力模型。我们将在 §4.3 中进一步讨论。

items.en: Our work is based on the assumption of deploying prior work of Prefill-Decoding (PD) disaggregation [31, 18]. With it, we can focus only on optimizing decoding, without worrying about the impact on prefill. Readers will see similar benefits of deploying AFD, i.e., how it allows us to divide-and-conquer attention and FFN designs. It leads to a model architecture whose both parts are more cost-effective. We implement the inference system and show that Step-3 indeed achieves much lower decoding costs compared with other multi-billion parameter models.
items.zh: 我们的工作基于部署先前预填充-解码（PD）分离工作 [31, 18] 的假设。这样我们可以只专注于优化解码，而无需担心对预填充的影响。读者将看到部署 AFD 的类似好处，即它如何让我们分而治之地设计注意力和 FFN。这导致模型架构的两个部分都更具成本效益。我们实现了推理系统，并表明 Step-3 确实比其他数十亿参数模型实现了更低的解码成本。

items.en: Decoding costs go beyond parameter count: Neither the total parameter count or activated parameter count is a good indicator for decoding costs.
items.zh: 解码成本不仅取决于参数量：总参数量或激活参数量都不是解码成本的良好指标。

items.en: For example, Qwen-3 MoE 235B exhibits only 10%10\% lower theoretical decoding cost (on H20, the best hardware for it) than DSv3 (on H800, the best hardware for DSv3) despite having 65%65\% fewer total parameters and 40%40\% fewer activated parameters.
items.zh: 例如，Qwen-3 MoE 235B 的理论解码成本（在最适合它的 H20 上）仅比 DSv3（在最适合 DSv3 的 H800 上）低约 10%，尽管其总参数少 65%，激活参数少 40%。

items.en: Step-3 achieves ∼40%\sim 40\% decoding cost reduction versus both models despite its total parameter count being between the two models and having the highest activation parameters.
items.zh: Step-3 与这两个模型相比，解码成本降低约 40%，尽管其总参数量介于两者之间且激活参数最高。

items.en: The attention design dominates decoding costs: With AFD, we decouple the cost analysis of attention and FFN because we can run them in the most cost-effective way, respectively. Then it becomes apparent that the attention design has a larger impact on decoding costs than (total or activated) parameter count.
items.zh: 注意力设计主导解码成本：通过 AFD，我们将注意力和 FFN 的成本分析解耦，因为我们可以分别以最具成本效益的方式运行它们。然后显而易见，注意力设计对解码成本的影响大于（总或激活）参数量。

items.en: KV cache size is not the single factor impacting attention costs: We find that some attention designs requires too much computation (too high arithmetic intensity) for lower-cost hardware platforms. More importantly, we are the first to show this problem indeed affects the final decoding costs and thus leaves large room for Step-3 to achieve significant cost savings.
items.zh: KV 缓存大小不是影响注意力成本的唯一因素：我们发现某些注意力设计需要过多计算（算术强度过高），不适合低成本硬件平台。更重要的是，我们首次证明这个问题确实影响最终解码成本，从而为 Step-3 实现显著成本节省留下了巨大空间。

items.en: MoE needs hardware-aware design: The degree of MoE sparsity must joinly consider hardware’s computation power, memory bandwidth and network bandwidth. Overly sparse models may have small activated parameters on paper, but run inefficiently on today’s hardware.
items.zh: MoE 需要硬件感知设计：MoE 稀疏程度必须联合考虑硬件的计算能力、内存带宽和网络带宽。过度稀疏的模型可能在纸面上激活参数少，但在当前硬件上运行效率低下。

items.en: For decoding acceleration, the devil is in the details: Linear attention, quantization, and MTP are all promising directions to accelerate decoding. However, some design points that may seem nuance can remove most of the benefits in decoding.
items.zh: 解码加速的细节决定成败：线性注意力、量化和 MTP 都是加速解码的有希望方向。然而，一些看似细微的设计点可能消除解码中的大部分收益。

items.en: AFD deployment: We believe it is the superior decoding system design compared with existing solutions, because of the following unique advantages:
items.zh: AFD 部署：我们相信它是优于现有解决方案的解码系统设计，原因如下独特优势：

items.en: Facilitating divide-and-conquer model design.
items.zh: 促进分而治之的模型设计。

items.en: Easy scaling of attention instances to handle dynamic context length.
items.zh: 轻松扩展注意力实例以处理动态上下文长度。

items.en: Always keeping an ideal batch size for FFN to achieve high MFU, independent from attention.
items.zh: 始终为 FFN 保持理想的批次大小以实现高 MFU，与注意力机制无关。

items.en: Overlapping communication overhead with a perfectly balanced pipeline.
items.zh: 通过完美平衡的流水线重叠通信开销。

items.en: Reducing the scale requirement compared with DeepEP [30], and getting better reliability and less EP imbalance.
items.zh: 与 DeepEP [30] 相比降低规模要求，并获得更好的可靠性和更少的 EP 不平衡。

items.en: Allowing the use of heterogeneous hardware to further reduce decoding costs.
items.zh: 允许使用异构硬件进一步降低解码成本。

items.en: Before diving into the model-system co-design details, we briefly describe Step-3.
items.zh: 在深入探讨模型-系统协同设计细节之前，我们简要描述 Step-3。

items.en: Step-3 is built upon the Transformer architecture [24], with each Transformer block comprising an attention module and a Feed-Forward Network (FFN). For the attention mechanism, we introduce Multi-Matrix Factorization Attention (MFA) [7], which leverages low-rank matrix factorization in the Query-Key (QK) circuit [5]. This design enables parameter-efficient scaling of both the number and dimensionality of attention heads while minimizing KV cache overhead. For FFNs, we adopt a shared expert design inspired by DeepSeekMoE, incorporating Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layers. Our configuration includes 61 Transformer layers with a hidden dimension of 7168. For MFA, we configure 64 query heads and they share a Key and a Value head, all with a dimension of 256. The query dimension is down-projected from 7168 to a lower-rank of 2048, followed by a normalization, and then up-projected to 64*256. MoE layers are applied to all FFNs except the first four and the last layer. Under this setup, Step-3 comprises 316 billion parameters, with 38 billion activated per token. There is an additional vision encoder of 5 billion parameters, which we do not discuss in this paper because it is irrelevant to decoding.
items.zh: Step-3 基于 Transformer 架构 [24]，每个 Transformer 块包含一个注意力模块和一个前馈网络（FFN）。对于注意力机制，我们引入了多矩阵分解注意力（MFA）[7]，它利用查询-键（QK）电路 [5] 中的低秩矩阵分解。这种设计能够在最小化 KV 缓存开销的同时，实现注意力头数量和维度的参数高效扩展。对于 FFN，我们采用受 DeepSeekMoE 启发的共享专家设计，结合混合专家（MoE）层。我们的配置包括 61 个 Transformer 层，隐藏维度为 7168。对于 MFA，我们配置了 64 个查询头，它们共享一个键头和一个值头，所有头的维度均为 256。查询维度从 7168 降维投影到较低秩 2048，然后进行归一化，再升维投影到 64*256。MoE 层应用于除前四层和最后一层之外的所有 FFN。在此设置下，Step-3 包含 3160 亿个参数，每个 token 激活 380 亿个参数。还有一个额外的 50 亿参数的视觉编码器，本文不讨论它，因为它与解码无关。

items.en: In the future, we will release more details on the model side for Step-3.
items.zh: 未来，我们将发布 Step-3 模型方面的更多细节。

items.en: We start by describing Step-3 inference system, which may be one of the first production quality serving systems that leverages the Attention-FFN Disaggregation (AFD) idea and achieves high-throughput decoding under strict SLO constraints. First, we elaborate on the rationale behind the AFD design.
items.zh: 我们首先描述 Step-3 推理系统，它可能是首批利用注意力-FFN 解耦（AFD）思想并在严格 SLO 约束下实现高吞吐量解码的生产级服务系统之一。首先，我们阐述 AFD 设计背后的原理。

items.en: Rationale. LLMs are typically composed of interleaved attention and Feed-Forward Network (FFN) layers, each exhibiting distinct computational and memory access patterns. For example, attention layers typically have a smaller number of parameters, but require storing the key-value cache (KV-cache) for each token, which is memory-intensive during inference. In contrast, FFN layers generally take up a much larger parameter count, especially for MoE models, yet do not require storing intermediate computation results. We will dive into the operational characteristics and inference costs of attention and FFN layers in §4.
items.zh: 原理。LLM 通常由交错的注意力和前馈网络（FFN）层组成，每层表现出不同的计算和内存访问模式。例如，注意力层通常参数数量较少，但需要为每个 token 存储键值缓存（KV-cache），这在推理过程中是内存密集型的。相比之下，FFN 层通常占用更大的参数数量，尤其是对于 MoE 模型，但不需要存储中间计算结果。我们将在 §4 中深入探讨注意力和 FFN 层的操作特性和推理成本。

items.en: Existing serving systems often treat these layers as monolithic blocks and overlook their intrinsic differences, leading to suboptimal GPU utilization. Hence, by disaggregating the attention and FFN components, we can better exploit their respective hardware affinities and optimize throughput. In addition, the disaggregation provides us with an opportunity to make an assumption: Both the attention and FFN parts can operate under ideal hardware conditions and can achieve high MFU, respectively.
items.zh: 现有的服务系统通常将这些层视为整体块，忽略了它们的内在差异，导致 GPU 利用率次优。因此，通过解耦注意力和 FFN 组件，我们可以更好地利用它们各自的硬件亲和性并优化吞吐量。此外，解耦为我们提供了一个做出假设的机会：注意力和 FFN 部分都可以在理想的硬件条件下运行，并分别实现高 MFU。

items.en: This idea is based on the Prefill-Decoding (PD) disaggregation approach [31], which advocates separating the prefill and decoding stages to optimize resource utilization. Hence, we focus on the decoding stage with AFD without worrying about the impact on prefill. The analysis will become much simpler with this divide-and-conquer approach.
items.zh: 这个想法基于预填充-解码（PD）解耦方法 [31]，该方法主张分离预填充和解码阶段以优化资源利用。因此，我们专注于使用 AFD 的解码阶段，而不必担心对预填充的影响。通过这种分治方法，分析将变得简单得多。

items.en: AFD deploys the attention and FFN layers onto separate sets of GPUs. This architectural separation allows each subsystem to adopt different parallelism strategies that best suit their computational characteristics. During layer-wise decoding, hidden states are transmitted between the attention and FFN subsystems through high-speed network communication. This interleaved communication pattern forms a tightly coupled pipeline, where attention and FFN act as upstream and downstream stages for each other.
items.zh: AFD 将注意力和 FFN 层部署到不同的 GPU 组上。这种架构分离允许每个子系统采用最适合其计算特性的不同并行策略。在逐层解码过程中，隐藏状态通过高速网络通信在注意力和 FFN 子系统之间传输。这种交错的通信模式形成了一个紧密耦合的流水线，其中注意力和 FFN 互为上下游阶段。

items.en: Furthermore, network transmission latency must also be taken into account. In such fine-grained scenarios, its magnitude is comparable to the computation time of both attention and FFN stages. This means that the communication stage should also be considered when orchestrating the pipeline.
items.zh: 此外，还必须考虑网络传输延迟。在这种细粒度场景中，其大小与注意力和 FFN 阶段的计算时间相当。这意味着在编排流水线时也应考虑通信阶段。

items.en: To achieve optimal overall performance, the processing latency of both sides must be precisely matched; any imbalance leads to pipeline stalls or under-utilized resources. Therefore, it is essential to jointly orchestrate the performance of A/F and communication stages.
items.zh: 为了实现最佳整体性能，两边的处理延迟必须精确匹配；任何不平衡都会导致流水线停顿或资源利用不足。因此，联合编排 A/F 和通信阶段的性能至关重要。

items.en: We summarize the design goals of AFD as follows, which will be discussed in detail later:
items.zh: 我们将 AFD 的设计目标总结如下，稍后将详细讨论：

items.en: Performance target: 50ms time per output token (TPOT, ≥20\geq 20 tokens/sec) via a 3-stage pipeline, with 16.6ms per stage for A/F/communication, respectively. Here the time is accumulated across all model layers.333Alternatively, we can also use a 4-stage pipeline: A -¿ communication -¿ F -¿ communication, with a 12.5ms budget for each stage.
items.zh: 性能目标：通过 3 阶段流水线实现每个输出 token 50ms 的时间（TPOT，≥20 tokens/秒），A/F/通信每阶段 16.6ms。这里的时间是所有模型层的累积时间。或者，我们也可以使用 4 阶段流水线：A -> 通信 -> F -> 通信，每阶段预算为 12.5ms。

items.en: Pipeline optimization: Resource allocation and performance tuning that enable perfect A/F/communication multi-stages pipelining, hiding communication latency.
items.zh: 流水线优化：资源分配和性能调优，实现完美的 A/F/通信多阶段流水线，隐藏通信延迟。

items.en: Independent design of A/F: With AFD, we can independently analyze the operational characteristics of attention and FFN. This separation not only enables optimal optimization for each subsystem, but also allows for flexible architectural modifications to the model itself.
items.zh: A/F 的独立设计：通过 AFD，我们可以独立分析注意力和 FFN 的操作特性。这种分离不仅使每个子系统能够实现最优优化，还允许对模型本身进行灵活的架构修改。

items.en: Hardware selection: Independent hardware selection for attention and FFN subsystems based on their operational characteristics.
items.zh: 硬件选择：根据操作特性为注意力和 FFN 子系统独立选择硬件。

items.en: DeepSeek EP. Large Expert Parallelism (EP) architecture is introduced in DeepSeek-V3 [4] to improve serving efficiency. Although EP also facilitates batch size amplification by distributing expert weights to multiple devices, we argue that this approach exhibits fundamental limitations compared to AFD.
items.zh: DeepSeek EP。DeepSeek-V3 [4] 中引入了大型专家并行（EP）架构以提高服务效率。尽管 EP 也通过将专家权重分布到多个设备上来促进批次大小放大，但我们认为这种方法与 AFD 相比存在根本性限制。

items.en: Deployment scale: A key advantage of AFD is its ability to operate efficiently at a smaller deployment scale. As mentioned before, DSv3 requires 320 GPUs for a decoding instance, while Step-3 only uses 32 GPUs (§7.3). If the deployment scale expands significantly, network congestion becomes a critical issue [29], resulting in increased and unpredictable latency. This heightened latency can severely impact the serving system’s ability to meet inference SLA.
items.zh: 部署规模：AFD的一个关键优势是能够在较小的部署规模下高效运行。如前所述，DSv3需要320个GPU用于解码实例，而Step-3仅使用32个GPU（§7.3）。如果部署规模显著扩大，网络拥塞将成为关键问题[29]，导致延迟增加且不可预测。这种高延迟会严重影响服务系统满足推理服务等级协议的能力。

items.en: Context-length efficiency: Long-context processing disproportionately burdens EP’s attention layers, causing FFN under-utilized due to fixed expert-node allocation. AFD resolves this via decoupled scaling of attention and FFN. We will present quantitative results on different context lengths in §4.
items.zh: 上下文长度效率：长上下文处理不成比例地加重了专家并行（EP）注意力层的负担，由于固定的专家节点分配，导致前馈网络（FFN）利用率不足。AFD通过解耦注意力机制和FFN的扩展来解决这一问题。我们将在§4中展示不同上下文长度下的定量结果。

items.en: Load imbalance issue: EP suffers from the well-known workload imbalanced issue [14, 13]. DeepSeek-V3 alleviates this issue using duplicated experts that can balance each GPU’s workload in an ad-hoc manner. But this approach incurs additional memory overhead, and is inflexible to dynamic workload changes, especially when the data distribution shifts significantly. On the other hand, AFD can easily leverage hybrid TP-EP strategy to strike a balance between computation efficiency, communication traffic, and load balancing.
items.zh: 负载不均衡问题：EP存在众所周知的负载不均衡问题[14, 13]。DeepSeek-V3通过使用重复专家以临时方式平衡每个GPU的工作负载来缓解此问题。但这种方法会带来额外的内存开销，并且对动态工作负载变化不灵活，尤其是在数据分布发生显著变化时。另一方面，AFD可以轻松利用混合TP-EP策略，在计算效率、通信流量和负载均衡之间取得平衡。

items.en: Heterogeneous hardware constraints: AFD enables more flexible hardware deployment, in that attention and FFN instances can be mapped to heterogeneous hardware tailored to their respective compute and memory requirements, while EP forces homogeneous hardware deployment, limiting specialization benefits.
items.zh: 异构硬件约束：AFD支持更灵活的硬件部署，因为注意力和FFN实例可以映射到针对各自计算和内存需求定制的异构硬件，而EP强制要求同构硬件部署，限制了专业化优势。

items.en: Performance modeling: Our following analytical framework leverages the architectural disaggregation of attention and FFN. This separation provides methodological clarity due to their divergent computational profiles, which enables more accurate modeling of performance ceilings while substantially narrowing the gap between theoretical projections and empirical measurements. Contrarily, EP-only architecture lacks this divide-and-conquer clarity, suffering from inherent analytical ambiguity when modeling coupled subsystems.
items.zh: 性能建模：我们的以下分析框架利用了注意力和FFN的架构分离。这种分离由于它们不同的计算特征而提供了方法论上的清晰性，从而能够更准确地建模性能上限，同时大幅缩小理论预测与实证测量之间的差距。相反，仅EP架构缺乏这种分治的清晰性，在建模耦合子系统时存在固有的分析模糊性。

items.en: In particular, we note that AFD is not a replacement for EP, but rather a complementary approach. In fact, Step-3 can be combined with the TP-EP strategy to achieve better performance and cost-effectiveness. The above analysis is against the EP-only architecture that does not employ AFD, which is commonly used in existing serving systems [4, 33].
items.zh: 特别地，我们注意到AFD并非EP的替代品，而是一种互补方法。事实上，Step-3可以与TP-EP策略结合，以实现更好的性能和成本效益。上述分析是针对未采用AFD的纯EP架构，这种架构在现有服务系统中很常见[4, 33]。

items.en: Megascale-Infer. To our knowledge, Megascale-Infer [32] is the first to build a disaggregated serving system leveraging the AFD idea. However, it focuses on high throughput rather than providing a practical implementation to achieve the low latency target (i.e., 50ms TPOT) simultaneously. In fact, according to [32], the reported latency per token of Megascale-Infer is 150ms, which is significantly higher than ours. Such high latency is not applicable for real-time applications like chatbots. Moreover, the core of Step-3 is in model-system co-design, and we use the AFD idea to design Step-3’s model architecture for attention and FFN layers, while Megascale-Infer primarily only focuses on system-level optimizations. We believe the co-design brings more opportunities to thoroughly exploit the hardware capabilities.
items.zh: Megascale-Infer。据我们所知，Megascale-Infer [32]是首个利用AFD思想构建解耦服务系统的系统。然而，它侧重于高吞吐量，而非同时提供实现低延迟目标（即50ms TPOT）的实用实现。事实上，根据[32]，Megascale-Infer的每token延迟报告为150ms，显著高于我们的延迟。如此高的延迟不适用于聊天机器人等实时应用。此外，Step-3的核心在于模型-系统协同设计，我们利用AFD思想设计Step-3的注意力和FFN层模型架构，而Megascale-Infer主要仅关注系统级优化。我们相信协同设计能带来更多机会，以充分利用硬件能力。

items.en: Given the important assumption that, with AFD, the attention part and the FFN part can operate near hardware limitations, we will now delve into the theoretical costs of each model. We compare Step-3 with several recently released models, namely DSv3 [4], Kimi K2 [17], Qwen3-235B-A22B [8] (Qwen3-MoE for brevity), Qwen3-32B [25], Llama 4 Maverick [15], MiniMax M1 [16] (MM M1), ERNIE 4.5 [22], and Pangu Pro MoE [21].
items.zh: 基于一个重要假设，即采用AFD时，注意力部分和FFN部分可以接近硬件极限运行，我们现在将深入探讨每个模型的理论成本。我们将Step-3与最近发布的几个模型进行比较，即DSv3 [4]、Kimi K2 [17]、Qwen3-235B-A22B [8]（简称Qwen3-MoE）、Qwen3-32B [25]、Llama 4 Maverick [15]、MiniMax M1 [16]（MM M1）、ERNIE 4.5 [22]和Pangu Pro MoE [21]。

full.secZh: 4.1 理论计算量和内存访问

items.en: We begin by examining the overall memory access and computational operations required for decoding each token.
items.zh: 我们首先检查解码每个token所需的总内存访问和计算操作。

items.en: Given that various quantization methods directly impact memory access and the type of floating point computation, we select widely used quantized versions for each model:
items.zh: 鉴于不同的量化方法直接影响内存访问和浮点计算类型，我们为每个模型选择广泛使用的量化版本：

items.en: MLA family: The official implementation of DSv3 uses BF16 for attention, with other parts in FP8. However, recognizing the existence of an FP8 quantized version of MLA within the open-source community, we adopt FP8 quantization for the whole model. The same quantization is applied to Kimi K2.
items.zh: MLA系列：DSv3的官方实现使用BF16进行注意力，其他部分使用FP8。然而，考虑到开源社区中存在MLA的FP8量化版本，我们对整个模型采用FP8量化。同样的量化应用于Kimi K2。

items.en: GQA family: The official release of Qwen3 includes full FP8 quantization, which we will use. For other models like ERNIE 4.5 and Pangu Pro MoE, to align with Qwen3, we also use the same quantization. We believe the risk of losing model accuracy is low given our own experience with GQA models.
items.zh: GQA系列：Qwen3的官方发布包含完整的FP8量化，我们将使用它。对于其他模型如ERNIE 4.5和Pangu Pro MoE，为了与Qwen3对齐，我们也使用相同的量化。根据我们使用GQA模型的经验，我们认为模型精度损失的风险较低。

items.en: Hybrid models: The official quantization of Llama 4 Maverick and MiniMax M1 is conservative, especially for attention. As hybrid attention model’s quantization remains largely unexplored for us, we mostly follow the official setup, i.e., BF16 KV for full attention layers because they are critical for long context tasks. We use FP32 for MiniMax M1’s Lightning Attention states, the same as its official setup. We give Llama 4 Maverick a favor for using FP8 for its chunked GQA attention, again based on our experience with GQA. For all the other parts we adopt the same aggressive FP8 quantization like all other evaluated models, to have a fair comparison.
items.zh: 混合模型：Llama 4 Maverick和MiniMax M1的官方量化较为保守，尤其是注意力部分。由于混合注意力模型的量化对我们来说仍 largely unexplored，我们主要遵循官方设置，即对全注意力层使用BF16 KV，因为它们对长上下文任务至关重要。我们对MiniMax M1的Lightning Attention状态使用FP32，与其官方设置相同。我们给予Llama 4 Maverick优惠，对其分块GQA注意力使用FP8，同样基于我们使用GQA的经验。对于所有其他部分，我们采用与其他评估模型相同的激进FP8量化，以进行公平比较。

items.en: Step-3: we have successfully quantized Step-3 to be a full FP8 model without losing model accuracy. So we use full FP8 quantization, which aligns with MLA and GQA faimly.
items.zh: Step-3：我们已成功将Step-3量化为全FP8模型，且不损失模型精度。因此我们使用全FP8量化，这与MLA和GQA系列一致。

items.en: If the hardware does not support FP8 quantization, we assume the use of INT8 weights and INT8 KV cache instead of FP8, so the memory access remains the same. The computation will be in BF16 or FP16.
items.zh: 如果硬件不支持FP8量化，我们假设使用INT8权重和INT8 KV缓存代替FP8，因此内存访问保持不变。计算将采用BF16或FP16。

items.en: The results are listed in Table 2 and 3. With the assumption of AFD, we divide the model costs into three parts: attention (without linear projection), the linear projection before and after attention, and FFN. For the first part, we consider the KV cache size and the computation simultaneously, since they grow linearly with batch size and context length.
items.zh: 结果列于表2和表3。基于AFD的假设，我们将模型成本分为三部分：注意力（不含线性投影）、注意力前后的线性投影以及FFN。对于第一部分，我们同时考虑KV缓存大小和计算，因为它们随批次大小和上下文长度线性增长。

items.en: For the linear projection before and after attention, we assume they can achieve compute-bound performance with sufficient batching. In this case, the memory access of the weights is amortized, and the costs will be determined by FLOPs. There is an exception where the q/k/v​_​p​r​o​jq/k/v\_proj of MLA and MFA may not be able to run in H800’s compute-bound area, due to those parts not being TP-friendly and may not have a large enough batch size for H800. This means we slightly underestimate MLA and MFA costs on H800. However, this is a relatively small part of the total costs and specific to H800, so we omit it for simplicity.
items.zh: 对于注意力前后的线性投影，我们假设它们可以在足够批处理下实现计算受限性能。在这种情况下，权重的内存访问被分摊，成本将由FLOPs决定。有一个例外：MLA和MFA的q/k/v_proj可能无法在H800的计算受限区域运行，因为这些部分不友好于TP，且可能没有足够大的批次大小用于H800。这意味着我们略微低估了MLA和MFA在H800上的成本。然而，这只是总成本中相对较小的一部分，且特定于H800，因此为简化起见我们忽略它。

items.en: For FFN, we focus only on the activated computation volume because, using AFD for not-too-sparse MoE, sufficient batching can always be accumulated for FFN to reach high MFU and amortize the memory access for weights. Further details on MoE sparsity are discussed in the §5. In the worst case, over-sparse models like DSv3, Kimi K2 and Llama 4 Marverick may see their FFN cost doubling or even tripling on H800 in real deployment. For now, we omit it for simplicity and give them a favor.
items.zh: 对于FFN，我们只关注激活的计算量，因为使用AFD处理不太稀疏的MoE时，总是可以为FFN累积足够的批处理以达到高MFU并分摊权重的内存访问。关于MoE稀疏性的更多细节在§5中讨论。在最坏情况下，像DSv3、Kimi K2和Llama 4 Maverick这样的过稀疏模型，在实际部署中其在H800上的FFN成本可能翻倍甚至三倍。目前，为简化起见我们忽略这一点，并给予它们优惠。

items.en: We also omit the embedding table and the final output linear layer since they consume relatively small (<5%<5\%) memory access and computation for these models, and they are not too different across different models.
items.zh: 我们还省略了嵌入表和最终输出线性层，因为它们对这些模型的内存访问和计算消耗相对较小（<5%），且在不同模型之间差异不大。

items.en: Next, we can calculate the theoretical decoding costs of the models on different accelerators. Table 4 shows the accelerator specifications and their estimated prices on public clouds.
items.zh: 接下来，我们可以计算这些模型在不同加速器上的理论解码成本。表4显示了加速器规格及其在公共云上的估计价格。

items.en: Suppose, in the theoretically ideal case, accelerators constantly at their peak FLOPs and maximum memory bandwidth, we derive the unit costs of a floating-point operation (UF​L​O​PU_{FLOP}) and a byte of memory access (Ub​y​t​eU_{byte}), in Table 5.
items.zh: 假设在理论理想情况下，加速器始终处于峰值FLOPs和最大内存带宽，我们推导出浮点运算的单位成本（U_FLOP）和内存访问字节的单位成本（U_byte），如表5所示。

items.en: The theoretical cost of the attention part is the larger of the attention’s core computation and memory access costs, plus the linear computation before and after:
items.zh: 注意力部分的理论成本是注意力核心计算与内存访问成本中的较大值，加上前后的线性计算：

items.en: Assuming, with AFD, we can keep the FFN part in the compute-bound region, the theoretical cost of the FFN part is simply the computation cost F​L​O​PF​F​N​UF​L​O​PFLOP_{FFN}U_{FLOP}.
items.zh: 假设通过AFD，我们可以将FFN部分保持在计算受限区域，则FFN部分的理论成本仅为计算成本FLOP_FFN U_FLOP。

items.en: Combining the attention and FFN parts, we obtain Table 6. The final costs of different deployment choices can be directly computed. For example, we can add the attention and FFN parts together for different context on each hardware. For AFD, we choose the cheapest hardware for attention cost and FFN cost, respectively, and then sum them up. We assume all communication time on network can be overlapped by computation in a multi-batch pipeline, so the communication costs are ignored.
items.zh: 结合注意力部分和FFN部分，我们得到表6。不同部署选择的最终成本可以直接计算。例如，我们可以针对每种硬件上的不同上下文，将注意力部分和FFN部分的成本相加。对于AFD，我们分别选择注意力成本和FFN成本最便宜的硬件，然后求和。我们假设在多批次流水线中，所有网络通信时间可以被计算重叠，因此忽略通信成本。

items.en: For brevity, we only show the results of Qwen family (representative for GQA models), DSv3 (representative for MLA models), and Step-3 in Figure 2. With all the results shown, we make the following observations:
items.zh: 为简洁起见，我们仅在图2中展示Qwen系列（代表GQA模型）、DSv3（代表MLA模型）和Step-3的结果。基于所有结果，我们得出以下观察：

items.en: Observation 1: Step-3 has the lowest decoding costs. When at 8K context length, Step-3 is the most cost-effective at 0.0550.055 per 1M decoding tokens (with AFD, H800 and H20), lower than DSv3’s 0.0680.068 (with EP and H800) and Qwen MoE’s 0.0620.062 (with AFD, H800 and H20). The advantage is larger at 32K context, with Step-3 at 0.1290.129, significantly lower than DSv3’s 0.2110.211 and Qwen-3 MoE’s 0.1930.193.
items.zh: 观察1：Step-3的解码成本最低。在8K上下文长度时，Step-3每百万解码令牌的成本为0.055（使用AFD、H800和H20），低于DSv3的0.068（使用EP和H800）和Qwen MoE的0.062（使用AFD、H800和H20）。在32K上下文时优势更大，Step-3的成本为0.129，显著低于DSv3的0.211和Qwen-3 MoE的0.193。

items.en: Observation 2: Total and activated parameter numbers are bad indicator for decoding costs. Qwen3 32B has much less total parameters than DSv3 and Step-3, and also slightly less activated parameters. However, the decoding cost of Qwen3 32B is the highest among all models in Figure 2.
items.zh: 观察2：总参数量和激活参数量是解码成本的不良指标。Qwen3 32B的总参数量远少于DSv3和Step-3，激活参数量也略少。然而，Qwen3 32B的解码成本是图2中所有模型中最高的。

items.en: Observation 3: The cost of attention is dominating the total decoding cost. It is clear in Table 6, at 8K context length, attention is already significantly more expensive than FFN. The gap grows quickly with longer context, given that FFN’s cost is irrelevant to context length. This means the attention design matters much more than activated number of parameters – that’s the reason for Observation 2.
items.zh: 观察3：注意力成本主导总解码成本。从表6可以清楚看出，在8K上下文长度时，注意力已经比FFN昂贵得多。随着上下文变长，差距迅速扩大，因为FFN的成本与上下文长度无关。这意味着注意力设计比激活参数量重要得多——这就是观察2的原因。

items.en: Observation 4: Hardware friendliness. DSv3’s MLA is quite unfriendly to hardware other than H800, resulting in multi-fold increase when running on hardware weaker than H800. GQA models like Qwen3 are quite unfriendly to hardware other than H20, because of large KV sizes. In contrast, Step-3’s MFA is more hardware-friendly, with minimal cost differences for weaker hardware. We show this in Figure 2.
items.zh: 观察4：硬件友好性。DSv3的MLA对H800以外的硬件相当不友好，导致在弱于H800的硬件上运行时成本增加数倍。像Qwen3这样的GQA模型对H20以外的硬件相当不友好，因为KV尺寸较大。相比之下，Step-3的MFA对硬件更友好，在较弱硬件上成本差异极小。我们在图2中展示了这一点。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Decoding costs (per 1M tokens) of different models and inference configurations. For AFD, we combine the lowest costs on different hardware for attention and FFN, respectively. Reminder: Step-3 has the most activated parameters among them.
items.capZh: 图2：不同模型和推理配置的解码成本（每百万令牌）。对于AFD，我们分别组合不同硬件上注意力部分和FFN部分的最低成本。提醒：Step-3的激活参数量在其中最大。

items.en: In this section, we discuss some ongoing model design trends in the community. We especially focus on the decoding phase.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们讨论社区中一些正在进行的模型设计趋势。我们特别关注解码阶段。

items.en: Linear attention and hybrid models. Linear attention is a promising direction but still faces challenges in long context tasks. A practical workaround is “hybrid models”, which consist of two types of attention layers; most are linear attention, while the rest are traditional full attention. For example, MM M1, using a hybrid architecture with 70 layers of linear attention and 10 layers of GQA full attention, exhibits significantly slower KV growth with context length compared to full-GQA models like Qwen3. The design of Llama 4 Maverick is similar except for the layer numbers.
items.zh: 线性注意力和混合模型。线性注意力是一个有前景的方向，但在长上下文任务中仍面临挑战。一个实用的变通方法是“混合模型”，它包含两种类型的注意力层；大多数是线性注意力，其余是传统的全注意力。例如，MM M1采用混合架构，包含70层线性注意力和10层GQA全注意力，其KV随上下文长度的增长明显慢于像Qwen3这样的全GQA模型。Llama 4 Maverick的设计类似，只是层数不同。

items.en: However, such hybrid models have two additional challenges for inference systems.
items.zh: 然而，这种混合模型对推理系统有两个额外挑战。

items.en: First, while the number of full attention layers seems small, they may still ruin the point of using linear attention for saving KV cache. MM M1 and Llama 4 Maverick’s full attention part alone (based on the official quantization scheme) has a larger KV cache volume than Step-3’s entire model. No matter how much the rest of the linear attention layers save, no matter how long the context is, the total memory access will be larger than Step-3, as shown in Figure 3.
items.zh: 首先，虽然全注意力层的数量看似很少，但它们可能仍然破坏使用线性注意力节省KV缓存的目的。MM M1和Llama 4 Maverick的全注意力部分（基于官方量化方案）的KV缓存体积就大于Step-3的整个模型。无论其余线性注意力层节省多少，无论上下文多长，总内存访问量都将大于Step-3，如图3所示。

items.en: Second, the time spent on each layer will be largely unbalanced – when running with long context, the full GQA layers consume much more time than the linear attention layers. This may not be a problem for single-node inference deployment, but can be quite troublesome for distributed inference deployment (especially AFD) when one tries to build a pipeline to hide communication time. The imbalance of layer times can cause significant pipeline bubbles.
items.zh: 其次，每层的时间将非常不平衡——在长上下文运行时，全GQA层消耗的时间远多于线性注意力层。这对于单节点推理部署可能不是问题，但对于分布式推理部署（尤其是AFD）来说可能相当麻烦，因为当试图构建流水线以隐藏通信时间时，层时间的不平衡会导致显著的流水线气泡。

items.en: In Figure 3, we compare MM M1 and Llama 4 Maverick with Step-3 using a single hardware (H800) setup. Due to the reason above, they always have higher decoding costs than Step-3 despite most of their layers being linear attention. Admittedly, using hardware with cheaper memory bandwidth (like H20) can largely narrow the gap. But fundamentally, they require more KV cache access than Step-3 in the end.
items.zh: 在图3中，我们使用单硬件（H800）设置比较了MM M1和Llama 4 Maverick与Step-3。由于上述原因，尽管它们大部分层是线性注意力，但解码成本始终高于Step-3。诚然，使用内存带宽更便宜的硬件（如H20）可以大幅缩小差距。但根本上，它们最终需要比Step-3更多的KV缓存访问。

items.en: We call for hybrid model designs that are more friendly to inference systems. One should design the full attention part carefully so that it does not ruin the cost saving from linear attention. Also, try to make every layer hybrid so that the time for each layer is balanced, instead of having a few slow layers that may limit the potentials of running in a distributed pipeline.
items.zh: 我们呼吁设计对推理系统更友好的混合模型。应仔细设计全注意力部分，使其不破坏线性注意力带来的成本节省。同时，尽量使每一层都是混合的，以便每层的时间平衡，而不是有少数慢层限制分布式流水线的潜力。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Total KV cache size and decoding cost comparison on H800 with hybrid linear attention models like MiniMax M1 and Llama 4 Maverick.
items.capZh: 图3：在H800上，与MiniMax M1和Llama 4 Maverick等混合线性注意力模型的总KV缓存大小和解码成本比较。

items.en: “Hardware-optimized design” – for training or decoding? Designing a model that is optimized for a given hardware is not a new concept. In this paper, we include Pangu Pro MoE, a model claimed to be specifically optimized for Huawei’s own accelerator, 910B.
items.zh: “硬件优化设计”——用于训练还是解码？针对给定硬件优化模型并非新概念。在本文中，我们包括Pangu Pro MoE，一个声称专门针对华为自家加速器910B优化的模型。

items.en: However, in our analysis, the decoding cost of Pangu Pro MoE on 910B is not low – it is theoretically much larger than Step-3 (Figure 4). Remember, Pangu Pro MoE has only 16.5B activated parameters, less than half of Step-3’s! It is evident that Pangu Pro MoE’s decoding on 910B is not cost-effective at all.
items.zh: 然而，在我们的分析中，Pangu Pro MoE在910B上的解码成本并不低——理论上远大于Step-3（图4）。记住，Pangu Pro MoE只有16.5B激活参数，不到Step-3的一半！显然，Pangu Pro MoE在910B上的解码根本不具成本效益。

items.en: To be fair, the main focus of Pangu Pro MoE was not about decoding cost, it was about training. We also show a rough estimation of training cost per 1M token assuming 100% MFU,444One can assume a more practical MFU like 40%, but the trend will not reverse. purely based on the theoretical FLOPs. We see that Pangu Pro MoE indeed is more than 50% cheaper than Step-3 to train, reflecting the difference in activated parameters.
items.zh: 公平地说，盘古 Pro MoE 的主要关注点并非解码成本，而是训练。我们还基于理论 FLOPs 给出了每 1M token 训练成本的粗略估计，假设 100% MFU¹。我们看到，盘古 Pro MoE 的训练成本确实比 Step-3 便宜 50% 以上，这反映了激活参数数量的差异。

items.en: The lesson is, be clear about the goal during model-system co-design. Training and inference can be vastly different. Training costs are largely tied to the number of activated parameters, while lowering decoding costs requires additional model-system co-design. We will discuss the co-design points immediately.
items.zh: 教训是，在模型-系统协同设计过程中要明确目标。训练和推理可能大不相同。训练成本主要与激活参数数量相关，而降低解码成本需要额外的模型-系统协同设计。我们将立即讨论协同设计的要点。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Step-3 and Pangu Pro MoE have very different trends of decoding cost and training cost.
items.capZh: 图 4：Step-3 和盘古 Pro MoE 在解码成本和训练成本上呈现出截然不同的趋势。

full.sec: 5.1 Matching Attention Arithmetic Intensity with Hardware
full.secZh: 5.1 匹配注意力算术强度与硬件

items.en: Readers paying attention (pun intended) may notice that in Tables 2 and 3, Step-3 ’s MFA exhibits only a 10% reduction in KV memory access volume compared with DSv3’s MLA. Yet in Table 6, Step-3 ’s attention cost is reduced by half or more in many cases. Why? The result stems from the design of MFA.
items.zh: 细心的读者可能会注意到，在表 2 和表 3 中，Step-3 的 MFA 的 KV 内存访问量仅比 DSv3 的 MLA 减少 10%。然而在表 6 中，Step-3 的注意力成本在许多情况下减少了一半或更多。这是为什么？原因在于 MFA 的设计。

items.en: As pointed out in prior work [27, 26], each attention design has an inherent property called arithmetic intensity. It is the ratio of the arithmetic operations needed for each byte of KV accessed from memory. Different batch sizes or context lengths do not change the arithmetic intensity.
items.zh: 正如先前工作 [27, 26] 所指出的，每种注意力设计都有一个固有属性，称为算术强度。它是从内存访问的每字节 KV 所需的算术运算比率。不同的批次大小或上下文长度不会改变算术强度。

items.en: The better the match between attention’s arithmetic intensity and a hardware’s “computation-bandwidth ratio” (or referred to as roofline) (see Table 4), the more likely it is to achieve good efficiency on that hardware. Otherwise, significant bottlenecks may occur, either compute-bound or memory-bound.
items.zh: 注意力的算术强度与硬件的“计算-带宽比”（或称为屋顶线）（见表 4）匹配得越好，就越有可能在该硬件上实现良好的效率。否则，可能会出现显著的计算瓶颈或内存瓶颈。

items.en: With Step-3’s MFA design, its arithmetic intensity is 128 (assuming 8-bit quantization of KV). It is much closer to A800 (roofline is 156) and 910B (roofline is 175) than DSv3’s MLA (arithmetic intensity is 512). On H20 (roofline is 74), Step-3’s gap is also not too large compared with Qwen3 MoE (arithmetic intensity is 32). To better illustrate, we show the above models and hardware in Figure 5. We show how compute and memory access grows with context length, from 8K to 32K, for each model. Correspondingly, we also plot a line for each hardware with the slope based on their computation-bandwidth ratio.
items.zh: 采用 Step-3 的 MFA 设计，其算术强度为 128（假设 KV 为 8 位量化）。它比 DSv3 的 MLA（算术强度为 512）更接近 A800（屋顶线为 156）和 910B（屋顶线为 175）。在 H20（屋顶线为 74）上，Step-3 的差距与 Qwen3 MoE（算术强度为 32）相比也不算太大。为了更好地说明，我们在图 5 中展示了上述模型和硬件。我们展示了每个模型在上下文长度从 8K 到 32K 时计算和内存访问的增长情况。相应地，我们还根据硬件的计算-带宽比为每个硬件绘制了一条线。

items.en: In Figure 5, it is also clear that Step-3’s MFA achieves low computation and memory access simultaneously. Namely, its required computation is one-fourth of DSv3’s, and its required memory access is one-third of Qwen3’s. This enables Step-3 to maintain low costs even on accelerators whose roofline does not match Step-3 well.
items.zh: 在图 5 中，也可以清楚地看到 Step-3 的 MFA 同时实现了低计算量和低内存访问量。也就是说，其所需计算量是 DSv3 的四分之一，所需内存访问量是 Qwen3 的三分之一。这使得 Step-3 即使在屋顶线与 Step-3 不匹配的加速器上也能保持低成本。

items.en: Step-3’ MFA achieves the more balanced arithmetic intensity and low overhead without cutting corners. In fact, its attention effective rank [7] is 16,384, the same as DSv3’s MLA and larger than Qwen3 MoE’s 8,192.
items.zh: Step-3 的 MFA 实现了更平衡的算术强度和低开销，且没有偷工减料。事实上，其注意力有效秩 [7] 为 16,384，与 DSv3 的 MLA 相同，且大于 Qwen3 MoE 的 8,192。

items.en: Step-3 chooses slightly lower arithmetic intensity than most of the hardware’s roofline, to leave room for future optimizations like quantization and MTP, as discussed next.
items.zh: Step-3 选择略低于大多数硬件屋顶线的算术强度，以便为未来的优化（如量化和 MTP）留出空间，如下文所述。

items.capEn: Figure 5: The compute and memory access of different attention designs during decoding, including DSv3’s MLA, Qwen3 MoE’s GQA and Step-3’s MFA. The compute-memory-bandwidth ratios of different hardware are also plotted.
items.capZh: 图 5：解码过程中不同注意力设计的计算量和内存访问量，包括 DSv3 的 MLA、Qwen3 MoE 的 GQA 和 Step-3 的 MFA。还绘制了不同硬件的计算-内存-带宽比。

items.en: Quantization: All models can adopt more aggressive quantization strategies than those we have assumed. A particularly noteworthy quantization approach is low-bit storage with high-bit computation, e.g., storing KV in 4-bit but performing attention calculation in 8-bit. This effectively doubles the arithmetic intensity of each attention design. Such a change has different meanings for different attention designs. We still use DSv3, Qwen3, and Step-3 as examples:
items.zh: 量化：所有模型都可以采用比我们假设的更激进的量化策略。一种特别值得注意的量化方法是低位存储与高位计算，例如，以 4 位存储 KV，但以 8 位进行注意力计算。这有效地将每种注意力设计的算术强度翻倍。这种变化对不同注意力设计具有不同含义。我们仍以 DSv3、Qwen3 和 Step-3 为例：

items.en: Implications for DSv3: Because DSv3’s arithmetic intensity is already close to H800’s roofline and much higher than other hardware, such quantization scheme will not improve efficiency.
items.zh: 对 DSv3 的影响：由于 DSv3 的算术强度已经接近 H800 的屋顶线，且远高于其他硬件，这种量化方案不会提高效率。

items.en: Implications for Qwen3: It might enable GQA-family models to get closer to or surpass H20’s roofline. It can benefit on all hardware listed.
items.zh: 对 Qwen3 的影响：它可能使 GQA 系列模型更接近或超过 H20 的屋顶线。它可能对列出的所有硬件都有益。

items.en: Implications for Step-3: This could potentially turn arithmetic intensity to exceed the roofline of A800 and 910B, but still not far off. There should be moderate performance gain. It may benefit a lot on H800 with higher roofline.
items.zh: 对 Step-3 的影响：这可能会使算术强度超过 A800 和 910B 的屋顶线，但差距仍然不大。应该会有适度的性能提升。在屋顶线更高的 H800 上可能受益很大。

items.en: For quantization schemes that use the same format for KV storage and attention computation (assuming the hardware has native support), we anticipate that those will not significantly alter the overall trends of different models.
items.zh: 对于 KV 存储和注意力计算使用相同格式的量化方案（假设硬件原生支持），我们预计这些方案不会显著改变不同模型的整体趋势。

items.en: Regarding hybrid models like MM M1, many (including ourselves) may wonder if aggressive KV quantization is feasible. However, given that there are only 8 layers of full attention and they might be more sensitive to quantized KV, we adopt a more conservative approach – using the official setup – in this paper. We look forward to more in-depth research on this topic.
items.zh: 关于像 MM M1 这样的混合模型，许多人（包括我们自己）可能想知道激进的 KV 量化是否可行。然而，鉴于只有 8 层全注意力，且这些层可能对量化 KV 更敏感，我们在本文中采用更保守的方法——使用官方设置。我们期待对此主题进行更深入的研究。

items.en: Multi-Token Prediction (MTP): MTP and the "low-bit storage, high-bit computation" quantization scheme have similar effects on arithmetic intensity – doubling (or even multiplying) it. Therefore, similar to the previous discussion, DSv3 is the least MTP-friendly model. GQA and MFA (Step-3) models can leverage MTP to enhance throughput on various hardware.
items.zh: 多词预测（MTP）：MTP 和“低位存储，高位计算”量化方案对算术强度有类似的影响——使其翻倍（甚至更多）。因此，与之前的讨论类似，DSv3 是最不 MTP 友好的模型。GQA 和 MFA（Step-3）模型可以利用 MTP 在各种硬件上提高吞吐量。

items.en: However, MTP’s impact is global – enabling MTP also alters the computation load of FFN. Under the assumption of AFD, where FFN can always get enough batch to run with high MFU (see the next section), MTP could actually incur additional costs. MTP is not 100% accurate in predicting additional tokens, yet FFN’s cost is always increased regardless of prediction accuracy. One must be very careful in deciding whether to enable MTP.
items.zh: 然而，MTP 的影响是全局性的——启用 MTP 也会改变 FFN 的计算负载。在 AFD 假设下，FFN 总能获得足够批次以高 MFU 运行（见下一节），MTP 实际上可能带来额外成本。MTP 在预测额外词元时并非 100% 准确，但无论预测准确度如何，FFN 的成本总是增加。在决定是否启用 MTP 时必须非常谨慎。

items.en: Summary: Step-3’s MFA design and its arithmetic intensity allows applying further KV quantization or enabling MTP to gain further cost savings than the results in Table 6. In principle, Qwen3 and other GQA-based models could benefit from similar mechanisms. However, due to the high arithmetic intensity of its MLA, DSv3 may not see substantial benefits from further KV storage quantization or enabling MTP in large-batch, high-throughput scenarios.
items.zh: 总结：Step-3 的 MFA 设计及其算术强度允许应用进一步的 KV 量化或启用 MTP，以获得比表 6 结果更多的成本节省。原则上，Qwen3 和其他基于 GQA 的模型可以从类似机制中受益。然而，由于其 MLA 的高算术强度，DSv3 可能不会从进一步的 KV 存储量化或在大批量、高吞吐量场景下启用 MTP 中获得显著收益。

full.sec: 5.3 FFN’s Batch Requirement for High MFU
full.secZh: 5.3 FFN 的高 MFU 批量需求

items.en: Next, we discuss the costs of the Feed-Forward Network (FFN). The majority of FFN computation involves matrix multiplications, with a very small portion for activation functions. Most memory accesses are for model weights, with a very smaller portion for input and output hidden features. For simplicity, we will focus on matrix multiplications and model weight accesses.
items.zh: 接下来，我们讨论前馈网络（FFN）的成本。FFN计算的大部分是矩阵乘法，激活函数只占很小一部分。大多数内存访问用于模型权重，输入和输出隐藏特征占很小一部分。为简化起见，我们将重点关注矩阵乘法和模型权重访问。

WFFNW_{\text{FFN}} denotes the number of model weights in the FFN. Clearly, the computation-to-memory access ratio (assuming 8-bit weight storage) is 2×Ntoken2\times N_{\text{token}}, or 2×B2\times B.

For example: - If 2 experts are chosen from 8, then S=14S=\frac{1}{4}. - If 8 experts are chosen from 256 plus one shared expert, then S=9256S=\frac{9}{256}.
